Every Aaron Rodgers TD Pass
  • Opponent
  • Season
  • Week
  • Distance
  • Search

Aaron Rodgers has thrown 576 touchdown passes in his NFL career. Below you will find every single one of them, organized in different ways.

TDs by Opponent

TDs by Season

TDs by Week

Aaron Rodgers has thrown 48 playoff TDs which is about 8.3 % of his total TDs.

TDs by Receiver

Aaron Rodgers has connected with Davante Adams for 84 touchdowns. He's also thrown TDs to 63 other players.

TDs by Distance

If you only count yards gained on passes that went for TDs, Aaron Rodgers has accumulated 10,352 yards. That's more passing yards than Robert Griffin III (9,355) threw in his entire career.
